ddt:Target.Name: ESC X82 - UDS - V1_9
ddt:Target.Description:
ESC MK100 (82 Project) ****************************************
Electronic Engineering : Tiberiu GHEORGHE (ALTEN)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.0 : Creation of database 1.1 : update following : NT65620_2010_213__diag_services_for_UDS v1-74.doc 1.2 1.3 : real circumference updated following X82 RSSH drawing 1.4: change the size of activation ASR request received (4 bytes to 3 bytes) 1.6: Update Diag base according to the SW F08/1 1.7: Add Auto-Identification reference 1.8 : Modification of Calibration screen for SWA. 1.9 : Adding DID for Signed WSS

Item.Text: Invalid ABS or ESC calibration parameter

Data.Name: Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV RR
Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet EV RR
Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV RL
Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet EV RL
Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV FR
Hydraulic valves and pump.intlet EV FR
Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV FL
Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet EV FL
Hydraulic valves and pump.FL RR Electric shuttle EV
Hydraulic valves and pump.FR RL Electric shuttle EV
Hydraulic valves and pump.FR RL Isolating EV
Hydraulic valves and pump.FL RR Isolating EV

Item.Text: FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or operation obstructed or blocked

DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: Function status.VESS fonction.inhibition by diag status
OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Device.Name: Invalid Data Received From Transmission Control Module (AT)
Lost Communication with Transmission Control Module (AT)
Invalid ABS or ESC calibration parameter

Label.Text: A reset of the totalizer odometer is only allowed after a driving test in the following situation:
- Totalizer odometer has not been reset more than 2 times

Display.DataName: Function status.HDC function.inhibition by diag status
Function status.HDC function.inhibition by switch status
Function status.ExtGrip function.inhibition by diag status

Label.Text: Renault Spare Part Number (Ref B for plant)
Vehicle Manufacturer ECU SW Number (RUC = Ref B)
System Supplier ECU SW Version Number
Manual status response upon stop request
Manual start response upon start request
Manual status response upon stop request
Manual start response upon start request
Manual status response upon start request
Press the gaz pedal and reach the engine RPM between 2000 rpm and 3000 rpm. Then, start the ASR control.
Manual start response upon start request
Hydraulic block secondary circuit bleeding procedure
-1- Place the bleeding tool on the brake liquid tank
-3- Make sure that all bleeding screws are closed
-2- Perform a manual bleeding on the four wheels without any ABS or ESC activation (primary bleeding)
-5- Click on button preliminary flush cycle and wait the end of the control (duration = 20 sec.)
-11- When no air is remaining, close the FR bleeding screw and then stop the FR bleeding procedure
-12- When FR bleeding is over, click on the button flush cycle and wait the end of the control (duration = 20 sec.)
-10- If air bubbles were still present when the procedure stopped, reactivate the FR bleeding procedure until no air is present (return to step 10)
-6- When flush cycle is over, activate the FL bleeding procedure and then open the FL bleeding screw (duration = 30 sec.)
-7- If air bubbles were still present when the procedure stopped, reactivate the FL bleeding procedure until no air is present (return to step 7)
-9- When FL bleeding is over, activate the FR bleeding procedure and then open the FR bleeding screw (duration = 30 sec.)
-4- ALL ALONG the procedure (from step 5 to step 15), the brake pedal must be pressed and released alternately (approx. 3 sec. pressed / 3 sec. released)
-14- Perform a manual bleeding on the RR bleeding screw (primary bleeding on FL/RR axis)
-13- Perform a manual bleeding on the RL bleeding screw (primary bleeding on FR/RL axis)
-15- You can release the brake pedal and stop and disconnect the bleeding tool
-8- When no air is remaining, close the FL bleeding screw and stop the FL bleeding procedure

InputOutputControl.Hydraulic valves and pump.Electric Shuttle FRRL Isolating EV and Pump

Label.Text: WARNING : Do not perform the hydraulic circuit control if the hydraulic circuit is not well bled
To check if the hydraulic circuit is well bled:
If the pedal is hard, you can perform the hydraulic circuit control
- Stop the engine and press 3 times the brake pedal:
If the pedal is soft : air is present in the primary hydraulic circuit ==> perform the hydraulic bleeding procedure
A - Keep pressed the brake pedal
C - Start the routine control by pushing the button of the approprate wheel (routine time = 4 sec)
B - Another personn have to try to manually turn the wheel to test
Remark : Routines have to be started one by one (simultaneous controls are forbidden)
D - During the routine, if the selected wheel is successively blocked/unblocked ==> Control is OK

Send.RequestName: InputOutputControl.Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet RR outlet RR pump
InputOutputControl.Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet RR outlet RR pump

InputOutputControl.Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet FL outlet FL pump
InputOutputControl.Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet FL outlet FL pump
InputOutputControl.Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet FL outlet FL pump
InputOutputControl.Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet FL outlet FL pump

Label.Text: 1- Select the wheel to check (the wheel speed sensor shall not be in failure)
96 poles are detected --> No tone failure
2- Turn the wheel selected to do exactly 1 wheel revolution without coming back in inverse rotation direction
Less than 96 poles (result is pair) --> Tone must be replaced
More than 96 poles --> The control routine has failed, try again from step 1
3- Stop the routine or select another wheel from step 1
Number of poles is impair --> Re perform the counting from step 1

Send.RequestName: RoutineControl.Magnetic tone wheel control.FL status request
RoutineControl.Magnetic tone wheel control.FR status request
RoutineControl.Magnetic tone wheel control.RL status request
RoutineControl.Magnetic tone wheel control.RR status request

Display.RequestName: RoutineControl.Magnetic tone wheel control.FR status request
RoutineControl.Magnetic tone wheel control.RL status request
RoutineControl.Magnetic tone wheel control.RR status request
RoutineControl.Magnetic tone wheel control.FL status request

Label.Text: Manual status response upon start request
Manual status response upon start request
Manual status response upon start request
Manual status response upon start request
Warning : This calibration routine shall not be used for the default vehicle configuration This service is only available for development needs.
Before executing the routine : the steering wheel angle shall be without failure and the steering shall be mechanically ajusted right
Before executing the routine : the ECU shall be without failure and the vehicle shall be on a plane surface
Before executing the routine : the ECU shall be without failure and the brake pedal shall be released

Screen.Name: A - Hydraulic valves and pump control

Label.Text: Reading of the valves and pump status

Label.Text: Variant coding unused with calibration files management
Use only for simulation on dry hydraulic group !!!

Label.Text: IS gateway activation / deactivation (In Supplier session only $10F0)
Manual request for tire real circumference
